context: You are checking into a hotel in Beijing. The receptionist greets you at the front desk.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 您好！欢迎来到我们酒店。

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say hello and that you have a reservation

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: Great! May I have your name?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Ask how much the room costs per night

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 单人间一晚五百元。包含早餐。
exchanges.translation: A single room is five hundred yuan per night. Breakfast is included.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 有的，整个酒店都有免费Wi-Fi。这是您的房卡。房间号是305。
exchanges.translation: Yes, there is free Wi-Fi throughout the hotel. Here is your room key. The room number is 305.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 退房时间是中午十二点之前。祝您住得愉快！
exchanges.translation: Check-out is before twelve noon. I wish you a pleasant stay!
